name: Children of Fallen Patriots Scholarship
amount: Full tuition or up to $6,250 per year

eligibility.other_requirements: Child of a service member who died in the line of duty or as a result of a combat-related disability; attend any accredited postsecondary institution

stackable_notes: Stackable with all other military and government benefits (GI Bill, DEA, etc.). Foundation aims to cover remaining unmet need.
notes: Designed specifically for Gold Star families (children of fallen service members). Does not replace existing military benefits — fills the gap. Foundation provides personal guidance through the financial aid process. Critical resource for a small but significant population.
